headline: Godot Engine
description: Godot is a free, open-source (MIT license) game engine created by Juan Linietsky and Ariel Manzur (2014). It features a unique scene system, dedicated 2D and 3D engines, and its own scripting language (GDScript, Python-like). Godot 4.0 (2023) brought Vulkan rendering, a new tilemap system, and improved 3D.
